svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="报修管理-状态机" id="repair-statemachine"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-280" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a1a1a;" value="报修管理 · 状态机图 (State Machine)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="560" x="40" y="4" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="init" parent="1" style="ellipse;fillColor=#333333;strokeColor=#333333;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="36" x="482" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="待审核
pending_review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="待提交方案
plan_pending" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="方案待审核
plan_review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="待执行
awaiting_execution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="维修中
executing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="待验收
pending_acceptance" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="已完成
completed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="410" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="已驳回
rejected" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="80" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#1a1a1a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="已撤销
cancelled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="740" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e0" edge="1" parent="1" source="init" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s2" value="审核通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s3" value="提交方案"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s4" value="审核方案通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s5" value="下发工单"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="s5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s6" value="完成维修"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="s6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#333333;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s7" value="验收通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="s6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#d79b00;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="s4" value="验收不通过 · 退回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="370" y="728" /> <mxPoint x="370" y="488" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#b85450;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="s8" value="驳回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="240" y="128" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="428" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#b85450;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;" target="s8" value="驳回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="280" y="368" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="442" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#666666;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;" target="s9" value="撤销"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="700" y="128" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="417" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#666666;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.6;" target="s9" value="撤销"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="248" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="434" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#666666;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="s9" value="撤销"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="590" y="500" /> <mxPoint x="830" y="500" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="图例 Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="190" x="80" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="28" x="14" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="待处理 (橙)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="50" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="28" x="14" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="执行中 (蓝)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="50" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="28" x="14" y="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="已完成 (绿)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="50" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="28" x="14" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="已驳回 (红)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="50" y="108" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;arcSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="28" x="14" y="138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="已撤销 (灰)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="130" x="50" y="134" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a1a1a;
